agentic AI.text: New DevOps'ish is out. Vint Cerf retires with a warning for the agentic AI crowd, ClickHouse is quietly winning the observability wars, and Podman 6.0 breaks things on purpose. DevOps'ish 316 devopsish.com/316/ #DevOps #Cloud #Kubernetes #AI #Tech #News

agentic AI.author: matthras.bsky.social
agentic AI.text: Worth reading the thread + preprint. Translation is done by agentic AI, but Rust's compiler + previous tests keep the code giving the right results as intended. Pretty safe guardrails as opposed to pure vibe-coding. Also if you've ever been a solo dev, this kind of stuff is lonely and long!

AI agents.author: emollick.bsky.social
AI agents.text: As working with AI agents looks more like management, we may want to consider large-scale management training for the AI era. The US government actually did this once, & the WW2 Engineering, Science, and Management War Training program taught 1.8 million & was a large reason for the post-war boom.

AI agents.author: davidcrespo.bsky.social
AI agents.text: something people will keep getting very wrong in AI and hiring discourse is that what firms need is not workers who can use AI. AI can use AI (people who don’t use agents will have trouble with this). firms need workers who can complement AI by doing things AI cannot do
